title: HORTICULTURIST
description:
. Liaise with internal and external stakeholders on Horticulture matter;

· To build and maintain strong client relationship and meet Client’s satisfaction;

· Attending feedback pertaining to horticultural works;

. Coordinate horticulture plans and schedules with Town Council;

. In-charge of horticultural maintenance of landscape under Town Council;

. Liaise with Town Council for arranging complains and sort out the issue;

· Identify diseases, pests and insect infestations that affect the health of trees;

· Assess all the plants, trees and materials to be delivered in the site as per drawing;

· Attend site meeting with the clients and reporting to the management regarding the meeting;

· Advise clients on proper care of various types and species of trees;

· Responsible for all site issues and ensure the problems are settle properly with the clients;

· Follow NParks standards and execute for implementation;

· Provide all the documents needed in the projects such as Risk Assessment, Safe Work;

. Procedure, Method of Statement, Work Schedules and other required documents in site;

· Responsible to conduct site briefing and tools box meeting to the workers;

· Liaise with operation team for the delivery of ordered items.

Requirements :

· Candidate must possess at least Bachelor's Degree/Post Graduate Diploma/Professional Degree in Agriculture/Horticulture or equivalent;

· At least 2 Year(s) of working experience in the related field is required for this position;

· Able to work under pressure and work beyond normal working hours and on weekends/public holidays if required;

· Positive and independent individual with good interpersonal, communication and organizational skill.

postedCompany.description:
Golden Landscape & Construction Pte Ltd (GLC) is an integrated company and started its business in 2012 solely as a landscaping company that offers great value of money through landscape services and minor construction. The company’s owner set up the business as a natural progression from his family’s traditional involvement in agriculture.

The management are expert with strategic planning in landscape projects and impressive background in horticultural services. The company aims to achieve and progress better landscaping services with the collaboration of well-known landscape and construction companies in Singapore. GLC also aiming for re-structuring landscape into a brilliant nature like gold by re-incarnating and deepens nature through landscaping.

GLC encourages employees to be constituent of growths and perseverance to venture better Singapore in the future. We are looking for more landscape maintenances, projects and provide better and competitive services. Customer’s fulfilment and satisfaction are our aspiration of success and development.
postedCompany.name: GOLDEN LANDSCAPE & CONSTRUCTION PTE. LTD.
